description: Tone profiles — sonic characteristics that define the emotional and timbral quality of audio output. Referenced by workflows, presets, and mastering chains.

tones.name: Warm
tones.description: Rich, full-bodied sound with emphasis on mid-low frequencies. Smooth highs.

tones.name: Bright
tones.description: Clean, sparkling sound with emphasis on highs and upper mids. Crisp transients.

tones.name: Dark
tones.description: Muted, brooding sound with rolled-off highs. Emphasis on low end and sub-bass.

tones.name: Aggressive
tones.description: In-your-face presence with punchy mids and sharp transients. High dynamic contrast.

tones.name: Smooth
tones.description: Silky, polished sound with gentle transients and even frequency response. Fatigue-free.

tones.name: Ethereal
tones.description: Dreamy, spacious sound with heavy reverb, modulated textures, and soft attacks.

tones.name: Gritty
tones.description: Raw, lo-fi sound with saturation, harmonic distortion, and analog noise.

tones.name: Clean
tones.description: Pristine, transparent sound with flat frequency response. Minimal coloration.

tones.name: Lush
tones.description: Rich, layered sound with wide stereo, dense harmonics, and complex textures.

tones.name: Punchy
tones.description: Emphasized transients with tight low end. Attack-forward and dynamic.
